name: Crucial T500 4TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe M.2-2280 Internal Solid State Drive with Heatsink - 232-layer TLC NAND - 2400 TBW - Sequential Read up to 7000MB/s - Sequential Write up to 6900MB/s (CT4000T500SSD5)
shortName: Crucial T500 4TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe M.2-2280
description: Crucial T500 high-performance NVMe SSD with 4TB capacity, PCIe Gen4 interface, heatsink, and TLC NAND for fast internal storage.
